title: RSSB Computer Instructor Vacancy 2026, Check Full Details & Apply Online -
short_info: RSSB Computer Instructor Vacancy 2026: Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) has issued a notification for the position of Computer Instructor. The recruitment drive comprises 3951 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 23-06-2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the RSSB Computer Instructor Vacancy 2026recruitment is provided below.
how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://rssb.rajasthan.gov.in/ Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position.
